user.title: Frigate connection
user.description: Enter your Frigate server details. Fields are pre-filled if the Frigate integration is installed.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Frigate. Check the URL.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your username and password.

abort.already_configured: Frigate Event Manager is already configured.

user.title: Add a camera
user.description: Select a camera from your Frigate instance.

data_description.cooldown: Minimum time (seconds) between two notifications for the same camera.
data_description.debounce: Accumulation window (seconds) before sending a grouped notification.
data_description.tap_action: Media opened when tapping the notification.
data_description.action_btn1: Action for the first button in the notification.
data_description.action_btn2: Action for the second button in the notification.
data_description.action_btn3: Action for the third button in the notification.

data_description.notification_title: Jinja2 template. Available variables: camera, severity, objects (list), zones (list), start_time.
data_description.notification_message: Jinja2 template. Available variables: camera, severity, objects (list), zones (list), start_time.
data_description.critical_template: Condition for sending a critical notification (overrides DND). Use 'Custom template...' to write your own Jinja2 boolean expression.
data_description.critical_template_custom: Custom Jinja2 template evaluated as boolean. Variables: camera, severity, objects, zones, start_time.
data_description.critical_sound: iOS only. Sound name for critical alerts (e.g. default, US-EN-Alexa-Motion-Detected.wav).
data_description.critical_volume: iOS only. Volume for critical alerts (0.0 = silent, 1.0 = max).
